summary: Retest of HIGH bug from iteration_7 (Band opacity when section hidden) on /paginas/p-inicio. Bug is NOT fixed. The expected change in EditorPagina.tsx (inline opacity: isDragging ? 0.6 : section.visible ? 1 : 0.6) was never committed; current source still has `opacity: isDragging ? 0.6 : 1` at line 55 and the Tailwind class `!section.visible && 'opacity-60'` at line 66 which is overridden by the inline style. Other flows (5 bands, WidgetPicker, BackgroundPicker, live preview sync) still work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: HIGH bug NOT FIXED. After clicking [data-testid='section-toggle-s-3'], computedStyle.opacity of [data-testid='section-band-s-3'] is still 1.0 (expected ~0.6). Source still reads: style.opacity = isDragging ? 0.6 : 1 (line 55) plus className adds 'opacity-60' when !section.visible (line 66). Inline style wins by CSS specificity, so the dim effect never renders. The agent-to-agent note says 'Tailwind opacity-60 fue removida y se incorporó la lógica en la prop inline style.opacity' but neither change is present in the file.

action_items: Actually apply the fix in /app/frontend/src/pages/paginas/EditorPagina.tsx. Replace line 55 with `opacity: isDragging ? 0.6 : section.visible ? 1 : 0.6,` and remove the redundant `!section.visible && 'opacity-60'` entry from the cn() call at line 66 to keep the source consistent. After commit, recheck getComputedStyle on section-band-s-3 → should be ~0.6 when hidden and 1 when visible.
critical_code_review_comments: The previously reported CSS specificity bug (inline style overriding Tailwind opacity class) is still in the file untouched. The retest request was based on a fix that was never persisted to disk.
Recommend also removing the now-redundant Tailwind `opacity-60` class so the source of truth for opacity is a single inline expression.

success_rate.frontend: Bug retest: FAIL. Regression of other flows: PASS.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug is reproducible at /paginas/p-inicio. Click [data-testid='section-toggle-s-3'] then read getComputedStyle(document.querySelector("[data-testid='section-band-s-3']")).opacity → returns '1' instead of '0.6'. Regression scope verified OK: 5 bands present, section-widget-s-1 and section-bg-s-1 still open popovers (2 radix containers detected each), and /paginas/p-inicio/seccion/s-1 live syncs content-title into section-preview (typed 'TITULO LIVE TEST' and it appeared in preview). Inline style attribute observed: 'opacity: 1; transition: transform linear;'.
rca of the issue: RCA: EditorPagina.tsx still applies `opacity: isDragging ? 0.6 : 1` inline on the <li> band. CSS inline styles override the class-based `opacity-60` rule (specificity 1,0,0,0 vs class 0,0,1,0), so toggling section.visible never visually dims the band. Reproduction: open /paginas/p-inicio, run `getComputedStyle(document.querySelector("[data-testid='section-band-s-3']")).opacity` before and after clicking section-toggle-s-3 → both report '1'. Mitigation: compose visibility into the inline opacity expression (preferred): `opacity: isDragging ? 0.6 : section.visible ? 1 : 0.6`. Also drop the redundant Tailwind `opacity-60` to avoid future confusion.
